brand.slogan: Centralize your payments and never miss a detail

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Manage your profile, preferences, and account security.

crop.title: Crop profile photo
crop.description: Adjust the image inside the circle before saving it.

feedback.invalidType: You can only upload PNG or JPG images.
feedback.saveFailed: We could not save the profile photo.
feedback.deleteFailed: We could not remove the profile photo.

notice.title: Check your email
notice.body: A verification code was sent to {{email}} to confirm the password change.

session.title: Password changed successfully
session.body: To protect your account, sign out and log back in with your new password.

feedback.currentRequired: Enter your current password to continue.
feedback.invalidNew: The new password does not meet the requirements.
feedback.newMustDiffer: The new password must be different from the current one.
feedback.invalidCode: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
feedback.emailSendFailed: We could not send the verification code. Try again.
feedback.generic: We could not complete the password change.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
twoFactor.description: Add an extra layer of security to your Kuentas account.

recentActivity.title: Recent activity
recentActivity.empty: There are no active sessions to show.

confirm.closeBody: The session on {{device}} will be signed out. That device will need to log in again.
confirm.closeAllBody: All sessions except this one will be signed out. Other devices will need to log in again.

feedback.closedAll: All other sessions were signed out.
feedback.currentSession: You cannot sign out the current session here.
feedback.notFound: The session is no longer available.

dangerZone.title: Danger zone
dangerZone.description: Once you delete your account, there is no going back. Please make sure you have exported any financial data you need.

confirm.title: Delete account
confirm.body: Are you sure you want to permanently delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
confirm.codeBody: Enter the verification code sent to {{email}} to continue.
confirm.invalidCode: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
confirm.emailSendFailed: We could not send the verification code. Try again.

upcomingPayments.title: Upcoming payments
upcomingPayments.description: Get a reminder one week before your due date.

paymentAlerts.title: Payment alerts
paymentAlerts.description: Notify when there are pending payments.

register.title: Create account
register.codeSentMessage: The code to create your account was sent successfully. Check your email address {{email}} to continue.
register.accountVerifiedMessage: Your account was verified successfully. You can now log in.

recovery.codeSentMessage: The code was sent successfully. Check your email address {{email}} to continue.
recovery.requestNoticeBody: If the email exists, we will send a verification code to {{email}}.
recovery.cooldownNoticeBody: You can request another code for {{email}} in {{seconds}} seconds.

passwordReset.subject: Verification code to change your password
passwordReset.title: Code to change your password
passwordReset.intro: Use this verification code on the recovery screen to confirm the password change for your account.
passwordReset.ignore: If you did not request this change, you can ignore this email.
textLines: If you did not request this change, you can ignore this email.

accountVerification.subject: Verification code to create account
accountVerification.title: Code to create your account
accountVerification.intro: Use this verification code on the registration screen to validate that you are creating a new account.
accountVerification.ignore: If you did not request this account, you can ignore this email.
textLines: If you did not request this account, you can ignore this email.

accountDeletion.subject: Verification code for account deletion
accountDeletion.title: Code to permanently delete your account
accountDeletion.intro: Use this verification code on the settings screen to confirm permanent deletion of your account.
accountDeletion.ignore: If you did not request account deletion, change your password and review your active sessions.
textLines: Code to permanently delete your account
If you did not request account deletion, change your password and review your active sessions.

passwordChange.subject: Verification code for password change
passwordChange.title: Code to change your password
passwordChange.intro: Use this verification code on the settings screen to confirm the password change for your account.
passwordChange.ignore: If you did not request this change, review your active sessions and keep your account secure.
textLines: If you did not request this change, review your active sessions and keep your account secure.

validation.invalidCredentials: One of the fields is incorrect
validation.tooManyLoginAttempts: Too many failed attempts, wait a moment
validation.emailRegistered: This email address is already registered.
validation.createAccountFailed: We couldn't create the account. Try again.
validation.invalidResetToken: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
validation.invalidVerificationCode: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
validation.resetEmailSendFailed: We couldn't send the verification code. Try again.
validation.resetEmailCooldown: Wait {{seconds}} seconds before requesting another code.
validation.accountVerificationEmailSendFailed: We could not send the verification code. Try again.
validation.invalidAccountVerificationCode: The verification code is invalid or has expired.
validation.accountNotVerified: Verify your email address before logging in.
validation.accountVerificationCooldown: Wait {{seconds}} seconds before requesting another code.
